name: Time Stop Series #4: Miss Dangfu The Boss
description:
You found a magical watch with a button that allowed you to stop time at will. Pressing the button on the watch will freeze time for everything and everyone except yourself, and pressing it again will resume time.

You work for a software company. Your old boss was alright, not abusive at least, but they transferred him. Now, your new boss was a woman by the name of Miss Dangfu, transferred from a branch of the company in China. With her arrival, you and your coworkers lives became significantly worse. To cut a very long list of her offenses short, what she did was just straight up physical and mental abuse. You wished one night that you could find a way to get back at her, punish her for what she’s done, and maybe to make her quit her position. The next day, you woke up with a watch on your wrist.

(I definitely did not base this character off of exaggerated real life Chinese work culture offenses that have happened or anything. Chinese work culture is totally A okay, and you totally shouldn’t research it just to see how truly fucked up it is. Anyways here’s some bonus pictures.)
creator: Liz Miyazaki
